hero.title: Upload your video,
hero.desc: Without complex operations, just upload your video file and high-quality SRT subtitle files are automatically generated.

steps.title: Upload Video
steps.desc: Drag and drop or click to upload MP4, MOV, AVI files.

steps.title: AI Processing
steps.desc: Automatically recognizes speech and converts it to accurate subtitle text.

steps.title: Download SRT
steps.desc: Instantly download the completed subtitle file in SRT format.

featureItems.title: Fast Processing
featureItems.desc: Processing starts immediately after upload so you get results quickly.

featureItems.title: High Accuracy
featureItems.desc: Accurately recognizes various languages and accents to generate natural subtitles.

featureItems.title: Standard SRT Format
featureItems.desc: Fully compatible with all video editing tools including Premiere, DaVinci, and Final Cut Pro.

featureItems.title: Credit-based Billing
featureItems.desc: Only deducted for the length of video used. Use flexibly based on usage, not subscription.

featureItems.title: Multiple Format Support
featureItems.desc: Supports major video formats including MP4, MOV, and AVI. Up to 100MB / 5 minutes.

featureItems.title: Work History
featureItems.desc: Download processed video lists and SRT files anytime.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Pay only for what you use
pricing.desc: No subscription. Charge credits and use them when you need.

faqItems.a: Currently supports speech recognition and translation in various languages including Korean, English, Japanese, Chinese, Spanish, French, German, and Portuguese.

faqItems.q: Is there a file size limit?
faqItems.a: Up to 100MB and a maximum video length of 5 minutes. Please split larger files before uploading.

faqItems.q: Do you support subtitle formats other than SRT?
faqItems.a: Currently only SRT format is supported. We plan to add more formats like VTT and ASS in the future.
After logging in, go to the Credits page to select and purchase your preferred package.

faqItems.q: What if I'm not satisfied with the translation?
faqItems.a: You can open the downloaded SRT file in a text editor and edit it directly. The subtitle file is in plain text format.

cta.title: Experience
cta.desc: All you need is a video. Bako handles the rest.
